notes: The game runs, but crashes frequently, especially early on in the Guest Patio area. Granted it was on a weak Core2 Duo E8200, with OBS recording in the background with software encoding. Later on it is possible to play 1hour+ without a crash. Just save frequently. I have finished 3 scenarios out of the 4 possible. Since it is an RPG Maker VX Ace game, you should expect similar behavior on your system to other RPG Maker games.
title: Fortress of Hell
